title: Construct K Palindrome Strings
titleCn: 构造 K 个回文字符串

testcases.input: s = "annabelle", k = 2 Output: true Explanation: You can construct two palindromes using all characters in s. Some possible constructions "anna" + "elble", "anbna" + "elle", "anellena" + "b"
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: You can construct two palindromes using all characters in s. Some possible constructions "anna" + "elble", "anbna" + "elle", "anellena" + "b

testcases.input: s = "leetcode", k = 3 Output: false Explanation: It is impossible to construct 3 palindromes using all the characters of s.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: It is impossible to construct 3 palindromes using all the characters of s.

testcases.input: s = "true", k = 4 Output: true Explanation: The only possible solution is to put each character in a separate string.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: The only possible solution is to put each character in a separate string.
